result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 7:     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS ha...
                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_cnt
  FROM case_base
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), agent_avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    c.ownerid,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_cnt
  FROM case_base
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), agent_avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.createddate::timestamptz AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamptz AS closed_ts,
    c.ownerid AS ownerid,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamptz)
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_cnt
  FROM case_base
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), agent_avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.ownerid AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.ownerid
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
